answer_en:
Medial Pterygoid m.
Origin: Medial surface of lateral pterygoid plate of sphenoid bone (deep head); tuberosity of maxilla, and pyramidal process of palatine bone (superficial head)
Insertion: Medial surface of the ramus and angle of the mandible

title: Lateral View of Infratemporal Fossa (Right Side)
